name: Gold Tone Black Clover Motif Bracelet
description: Make a chic and lucky statement with this elegant gold-tone bracelet. Showcasing five iconic clover motifs with striking black centers connected by a delicate chain. Finished with a premium anti-tarnish coating, ensuring this sophisticated piece remains radiant through everyday wear.

media.alt_text: Gold tone chain bracelet featuring five black clover motifs with textured borders

faqs.question: How many clover charms are on the bracelet?
faqs.answer: This elegant bracelet features five evenly spaced black clover motifs.

faqs.question: Does the bracelet have an extender?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is designed with an adjustable extender chain to ensure a comfortable fit for various wrist sizes.

meta_title: Gold Tone Black Clover Bracelet | Anti-Tarnish
meta_description: Shop the sophisticated Gold Tone Black Clover Motif Bracelet. Featuring five bold black clovers on a delicate chain with a premium anti-tarnish finish.
